title: Tokyo Idols
overview: This exploration of Japan's fascination with girl bands and their music follows an aspiring pop singer and her fans, delving into the cultural obsession with young female sexuality and the growing disconnect between men and women in hypermodern societies.

trailers.title: Tokyo Idols (2017) - TRAILER | BELDOCS 2017
trailers.channel_name: BELDOCS - International Documentary Film Festival Belgrade
